robust_sql: WITH Cleaned_Departments AS (SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM Departments) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dp.degree_program_id) AS degree_count FROM Cleaned_Departments AS cd JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON cd.department_id = dp.department_id WHERE cd.department_name = 'Engineering'

basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ModelId) AS ModelCount FROM model_list WHERE Maker = (SELECT Id FROM car_makers WHERE FullName = 'American Motor Company')

basic_sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(m.Id) AS MakerCount FROM car_makers AS m JOIN countries AS co ON m.Country = co.CountryName GROUP BY c.Continent
robust_sql: WITH country_dedup AS (SELECT DISTINCT CountryId, CountryName, Continent FROM countries), maker_count AS (SELECT cd.Continent, COUNT(m.Id) AS MakerCount FROM car_makers AS m JOIN country_dedup AS cd ON m.Country = cd.CountryName GROUP BY cd.Continent) SELECT * FROM maker_count

basic_sql: SELECT d.department_name, d.department_id FROM Degrees_Programs AS dp JOIN Departments AS d ON dp.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_id ORDER BY COUNT(dp.degree_program_id) DESC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH Deduped_Departments AS (SELECT DISTINCT department_id, department_name, department_description, other_details FROM Departments) SELECT dd.department_name, dd.department_id FROM Degrees_Programs AS dp JOIN Deduped_Departments AS dd ON dp.department_id = dd.department_id GROUP BY dd.department_id ORDER BY COUNT(dp.degree_program_id) DESC LIMIT 1

basic_sql: SELECT t.transcript_date, t.transcript_id FROM Transcripts AS t JOIN (SELECT tc.transcript_id, COUNT(*) AS content_count FROM Transcript_Contents AS tc GROUP BY tc.transcript_id) AS sub ON t.transcript_id = sub.transcript_id ORDER BY sub.content_count ASC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH DedupedTranscripts AS (SELECT DISTINCT transcript_id, transcript_date FROM Transcripts), ContentCounts AS (SELECT tc.transcript_id, COUNT(*) AS content_count FROM Transcript_Contents AS tc GROUP BY tc.transcript_id) SELECT dt.transcript_date, dt.transcript_id FROM DedupedTranscripts AS dt JOIN ContentCounts AS cc ON dt.transcript_id = cc.transcript_id ORDER BY cc.content_count ASC LIMIT 1

basic_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Model FROM cars_data AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Maker = T2.Maker WHERE T1.Weight < (SELECT AVG(Weight) FROM cars_data)
robust_sql: WITH AvgWeight AS (SELECT AVG(Weight) AS avg_weight FROM cars_data), FilteredCars AS (SELECT DISTINCT Id, Weight FROM cars_data WHERE Weight < (SELECT avg_weight FROM AvgWeight)), ModelsWithLowWeight AS (SELECT T2.Model FROM FilteredCars AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Maker = T2.Maker) SELECT DISTINCT Model FROM ModelsWithLowWeight

basic_sql: SELECT T1.FullName, T1.Id, COUNT(T2.ModelId) AS NumberOfModels FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.FullName, T1.Id ORDER BY NumberOfModels DESC
robust_sql: WITH cleaned_car_makers AS (SELECT DISTINCT Id, Maker, FullName FROM car_makers), cleaned_model_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT ModelId, Maker FROM model_list) SELECT T1.FullName, T1.Id, COUNT(T2.ModelId) AS NumberOfModels FROM cleaned_car_makers AS T1 JOIN cleaned_model_list AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.FullName, T1.Id ORDER BY NumberOfModels DESC

basic_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name FROM Degrees_Programs AS dp JOIN Student_Enrolment AS se ON dp.degree_program_id = se.degree_program_id JOIN Students AS s ON se.student_id = s.student_id WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelors'

basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cars_data WHERE Accelerate > (SELECT MAX(Horsepower) FROM cars_data)
robust_sql: WITH MaxHorsepower AS (SELECT MAX(Horsepower) AS max_horsepower FROM cars_data), FilteredCars AS (SELECT * FROM cars_data WHERE Accelerate > (SELECT max_horsepower FROM MaxHorsepower)) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FilteredCars

basic_sql: SELECT T.Model, COUNT(DISTINCT T.MakeId) AS VersionCount FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ModelId, Maker, Model, MakeId FROM model_list) AS T GROUP BY T.Model ORDER BY VersionCount DESC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH DistinctModels AS (SELECT DISTINCT ModelId, Maker, Model, MakeId FROM model_list), VersionCounts AS (SELECT Model, COUNT(DISTINCT MakeId) AS VersionCount FROM DistinctModels GROUP BY Model) SELECT Model, VersionCount FROM VersionCounts ORDER BY VersionCount DESC LIMIT 1
